/- The `synTaut` linter reports:
THE FOLLOWING DECLARATIONS ARE SYNTACTIC TAUTOLOGIES. This usually means that they are of the form `∀ a b ... z, e₁ = e₂` where `e₁` and `e₂` are identical expressions. We call declarations of this form syntactic tautologies. Such lemmas are (mostly) useless and sometimes introduced unintentionally when proving basic facts using `rfl`, when elaboration results in a different term than the user intended. You should check that the declaration really says what you think it does. -/
-- Formal.AG.Examples.RepresentationAnalysisPart7
#check AAT.AG.FiniteModel.RepresentationAnalysisPart7.detectingRepresentation_toy_zero_is_actual_zero /- LHS equals RHS syntactically -/

-- Formal.AG.SingularityMonodromyStack.ArchitectureStack

-- Formal.AG.Cohomology.CochainComparison
#check @AAT.AG.Cohomology.CoverRelativeCechComplex.FinitePosetComparisonTarget.generatedH1To /- argument 13 _to0_eq_target : ∀
  (c : K.Cn 0),
  E.to0 c =
    T.toFinitePosetCochain 0
      c, argument 14 _to1_eq_target : ∀ (c : K.Cn 1),
  E.to1 c =
    T.toFinitePosetCochain 1
      c, argument 15 _from0_eq_target : ∀ (c : T.finitePosetCochain 0),
  E.from0 c =
    T.fromFinitePosetCochain 0
      c, argument 16 _from1_eq_target : ∀ (c : T.finitePosetCochain 1),
  E.from1 c =
    T.fromFinitePosetCochain 1
      c, argument 17 _d0_eq_target : ∀ (c : T.finitePosetCochain 0),
  L.d0 c =
    T.finitePosetDifferential 0
      c, argument 18 _d1_eq_target : ∀ (c : T.finitePosetCochain 1), L.d1 c = T.finitePosetDifferential 1 c -/
#check @AAT.AG.Cohomology.CoverRelativeCechComplex.FinitePosetComparisonTarget.generatedH1From /- argument 13 _to0_eq_target : ∀
  (c : K.Cn 0),
  E.to0 c =
    T.toFinitePosetCochain 0
      c, argument 14 _to1_eq_target : ∀ (c : K.Cn 1),
  E.to1 c =
    T.toFinitePosetCochain 1
      c, argument 15 _from0_eq_target : ∀ (c : T.finitePosetCochain 0),
  E.from0 c =
    T.fromFinitePosetCochain 0
      c, argument 16 _from1_eq_target : ∀ (c : T.finitePosetCochain 1),
  E.from1 c =
    T.fromFinitePosetCochain 1
      c, argument 17 _d0_eq_target : ∀ (c : T.finitePosetCochain 0),
  L.d0 c =
    T.finitePosetDifferential 0
      c, argument 18 _d1_eq_target : ∀ (c : T.finitePosetCochain 1), L.d1 c = T.finitePosetDifferential 1 c -/
#check @AAT.AG.Cohomology.CoverRelativeCechComplex.FinitePosetComparisonTarget.withGeneratedH1 /- argument 13 _to0_eq_target : ∀
  (c : K.Cn 0),
  E.to0 c =
    T.toFinitePosetCochain 0
      c, argument 14 _to1_eq_target : ∀ (c : K.Cn 1),
  E.to1 c =
    T.toFinitePosetCochain 1
      c, argument 15 _from0_eq_target : ∀ (c : T.finitePosetCochain 0),
  E.from0 c =
    T.fromFinitePosetCochain 0
      c, argument 16 _from1_eq_target : ∀ (c : T.finitePosetCochain 1),
  E.from1 c =
    T.fromFinitePosetCochain 1
      c, argument 17 _d0_eq_target : ∀ (c : T.finitePosetCochain 0),
  L.d0 c =
    T.finitePosetDifferential 0
      c, argument 18 _d1_eq_target : ∀ (c : T.finitePosetCochain 1), L.d1 c = T.finitePosetDifferential 1 c -/

-- Formal.AG.Cohomology.Cohomology
#check @AAT.AG.Cohomology.ConditionalSpaceCohomology.HnX /- argument 8 _H : AAT.AG.Cohomology.ConditionalSpaceCohomology
  K n -/

-- Formal.AG.Cohomology.FiniteExamples

-- Formal.AG.Cohomology.FinitePosetComparison
#check @AAT.AG.Cohomology.FinitePosetCechComparisonData.generatedH1To /- argument 13 _to0_eq_data : ∀
  (c : D.generalComplex.Cn 0),
  E.to0 c =
    D.toFinitePosetCochain 0
      c, argument 14 _to1_eq_data : ∀ (c : D.generalComplex.Cn 1),
  E.to1 c =
    D.toFinitePosetCochain 1
      c, argument 15 _from0_eq_data : ∀ (c : AAT.AG.Site.FinitePosetCechCochain K 0),
  E.from0 c =
    D.fromFinitePosetCochain 0
      c, argument 16 _from1_eq_data : ∀ (c : AAT.AG.Site.FinitePosetCechCochain K 1),
  E.from1 c =
    D.fromFinitePosetCochain 1
      c, argument 17 _d0_eq_data : ∀ (c : AAT.AG.Site.FinitePosetCechCochain K 0),
  L.d0 c =
    C.differential 0
      c, argument 18 _d1_eq_data : ∀ (c : AAT.AG.Site.FinitePosetCechCochain K 1), L.d1 c = C.differential 1 c -/
#check @AAT.AG.Cohomology.FinitePosetCechComparisonData.generatedH1From /- argument 13 _to0_eq_data : ∀
  (c : D.generalComplex.Cn 0),
  E.to0 c =
    D.toFinitePosetCochain 0
      c, argument 14 _to1_eq_data : ∀ (c : D.generalComplex.Cn 1),
  E.to1 c =
    D.toFinitePosetCochain 1
      c, argument 15 _from0_eq_data : ∀ (c : AAT.AG.Site.FinitePosetCechCochain K 0),
  E.from0 c =
    D.fromFinitePosetCochain 0
      c, argument 16 _from1_eq_data : ∀ (c : AAT.AG.Site.FinitePosetCechCochain K 1),
  E.from1 c =
    D.fromFinitePosetCochain 1
      c, argument 17 _d0_eq_data : ∀ (c : AAT.AG.Site.FinitePosetCechCochain K 0),
  L.d0 c =
    C.differential 0
      c, argument 18 _d1_eq_data : ∀ (c : AAT.AG.Site.FinitePosetCechCochain K 1), L.d1 c = C.differential 1 c -/
